description_long: A male security guard is outfitted in a tactical uniform, featuring a black balaclava covering his head and face, leaving only the eyes, nose, and mouth exposed. He wears a light beige tactical vest over a short-sleeved, light-colored shirt, with a utility belt and pouches secured around his waist. His hands are gloved in black, and he is dressed in dark cargo pants with reinforced knees and sturdy brown boots. The vest appears to be padded and functional, likely for carrying equipment and providing some protection. The overall appearance is utilitarian and prepared for urban security duties, with no visible insignia or badge. The guard's posture is upright and alert, with arms slightly extended and feet shoulder-width apart.
description: A masked male security guard in a tactical vest, gloves, cargo pants, and boots, standing alert and ready for duty.
description_view_0: Front view shows the balaclava, tactical vest, gloves, utility belt, and full facial coverage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the vest, arm, and leg, with visible pouches on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, belt, and pants, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the vest, arm, and leg, with gloves and boots visible.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a tactical uniform consisting of a black balaclava, a light beige padded tactical vest, a short-sleeved light shirt, dark cargo pants, black gloves, and brown boots. The uniform is utilitarian and standardized for urban security, with a focus on functionality and protection, and includes a utility belt with pouches.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly extended and feet shoulder-width apart, displaying an alert and ready demeanor.
